level_3_metrics.metric_name: Number Of Corruption Or Bribery Convictions
user_friendly_explanation:
Aquafil has a strong track record when it comes to preventing corruption and bribery. In 2024, the company reported no instances of convictions, fines, or legal actions related to corruption or fraud across its entire group. This means that their policies and efforts to ensure ethical business conduct are effective, contributing to a clean and trustworthy operation.

*   No corruption or bribery convictions in 2024.
*   No fines or penalties for violations of ethical conduct or anti-corruption policies.
*   The company's internal oversight mechanisms confirmed no related issues.

There are no specific technical terms requiring further explanation for this metric.
information: As a result of this commitment, the Aquafil Group has not received any convictions for violations of tax laws , unfair competition , corruption or fraud, or violation of workers' rights and human rights .

In 2024, no Group company incurred fines or other penalties for violations related to the Code of Conduct or related regulations, evidence of the effectiveness of the procedures and actions put in place as part of the corporate culture that the company monitors on a daily basis.

Constant efforts in this area have ensured that - again in 2024 - no Group company incurred fines, penalties or legal action for irreg -ularities or non-compliance in the areas regulated by the Organi -sational Model.

The effectiveness of our procedures, actions and ongoing commitment to training (see section 4) is demonstrated by the fact that again in 2024 no Group company incurred fines, penalties or legal action for irregularities or non-compliance with the Anti-Corruption Policy.

Come conseguenza di questo impegno, il Gruppo Aquafil non ha ricevuto condanne per violazioni delle leggi fiscali, concorrenza sleale, corruzione o frode, o violazione dei diritti dei lavoratori e diritti umani.

Nel 2024, nessuna società del Gruppo ha subito sanzioni pecuniarie o di altra natura per infrazioni relative al Codice Etico o alle normative correlate, prova dell'efficacia delle procedure e azioni messe in campo nell'ambito della cultura aziendale che l'azienda monitora quotidianamente.

L'impegno costante in questo ambito ha garantito che, anche nel 2024, nessuna società del Gruppo sia incorsa in multe, sanzioni o azioni legali per irregolarità o inosservanze negli ambiti disciplinati dal Modello Organizzativo.

user_friendly_explanation_italian:
Aquafil ha implementato un solido sistema per consentire a chiunque, inclusi dipendenti, fornitori e clienti, di segnalare comportamenti scorretti senza timore di ritorsioni. Utilizzano una piattaforma online anonima gestita da un'entità esterna. Condividono anche informazioni sul numero di segnalazioni ricevute e sulle azioni intraprese, dimostrando di prendere sul serio tali preoccupazioni. Formano persino il proprio personale su come utilizzare questo sistema. Ciò dimostra un impegno verso la trasparenza e la protezione di coloro che segnalano. Gli aspetti chiave includono:
* Una piattaforma online dedicata per segnalazioni anonime.
* Protezione contro qualsiasi forma di ritorsione.
* Un organismo indipendente gestisce la piattaforma e le segnalazioni vengono esaminate tempestivamente.
* Trasparenza sul numero e sulla risoluzione delle segnalazioni ricevute.
* Formazione e sensibilizzazione per tutti i lavoratori su come utilizzare il sistema.
user_friendly_explanation:
Aquafil has a strong system in place to let anyone, including employees, suppliers, and customers, report bad behavior without fear of getting in trouble. They use an anonymous online platform managed by an outside group. They also share information about how many reports they receive and what actions they take, showing they take these concerns seriously. They even train their staff on how to use this system. This shows a commitment to openness and protecting those who speak up. Key aspects include:
* A dedicated online platform for anonymous reports.
* Protection against any form of retaliation.
* An independent body manages the platform and reports are reviewed promptly.
* Transparency on the number and resolution of reports received.
* Training and awareness for all workers on how to use the system.

Explanation of the term: 'Anonymous online platform' means a secure website where people can submit reports without revealing their identity. 'Independent entity (Management Body)' refers to an external or internal body within the company structure that acts without undue influence to manage the whistleblowing process, ensuring impartiality.
information: Aquafil is continuously committed to identifying, assessing, preventing, and mitigating risks related to Human Rights violations, ... A dedicated reporting channel is available to stakeholders (the 'Whistleblowing / Reporting' procedure published on Aquafil's website: https://digitalplatorm.unionefiduciaria.it/whistleblowing/), allowing for the submission of reports -including anonymous ones -concerning any situation that, in breach of this Policy, constitutes or may constitute a risk of Human Rights violation, a breach of applicable laws, or of internal procedures. Aquafil ensures that all reports are handled confidentially in order to guarantee full protection of the whistleblower. [Source: Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy, Page 7]

Aquafil makes a copy of the Code available to all employees, suppliers, customers and outside contractors and requires their acceptance. ... Any addressee who becomes aware of a violation of the principles of the Code of Conduct is required to report it as outlined in the whistleblowing procedure described in section 4.4. It is a tool for preventing, detecting and managing cases of corruption with input from all stakeholders. These violations are investigated by an independent body (Management Body) and the results are reported quarterly to the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee and the Supervisory Board ensuring periodic monitoring. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 112]

All Group stakeholders have the opportunity to report, in complete anonymity, unlawful conduct, incidents of harassment and bullying and violations of the Code of Conduct. ... Our whistleblowing procedure helps us ensure the highest ethical standards: employees, suppliers, external contractors and customers are provided with an IT platform for submitting reports of wrongdoing, irregularities and non-compliance, accessible 24/7. Aquafil always guarantees anonymity, confidentiality and protection against any form of retaliation or discrimination against the reporter. Currently, the platform is managed by an independent entity (Management Body), which ensures the confidentiality of information through security protocols and advanced encryption tools. Reports are processed promptly (within 7 days) by specially trained staff. If the alleged violation is among the illegal behaviours regulated by Legislative Decree No. 24 of March 10, 2023, which implements European Directive No. 1937/2019, the Management Body shall promptly inform a special Aquafil Internal Committee (composed of the CFO, Internal Audit, Legal, HR and a member of the Supervisory Board) to verify the merits of the report. If the report is well-founded, the company will apply disciplinary sanctions proportionate to the severity of the violation. Once the internal investigation is completed, a response is provided to the reporter no later than 3 months after receipt of the report. If the report turns out to be unfounded, the file is closed; conversely, if the report turns out to be well-founded, it is promptly communicated to the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee and the Supervisory Board, which receive detailed information on reports received and handled through a dedicated channel. The Group ensures, at the onboarding stage, that the new employee is informed and aware of the existence of this tool. It also organises business conduct training courses (see chapter 4) that provides further information on the use of whistleblowing. In addition, it provides up-to-date information through circulars, e-mail and the company intranet. The platform is available in all languages of the Group's major companies to ensure maximum accessibility. 100% of workers have access to the platform and 98% have the ability to use it in their native language. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 115]

Defines the whistleblowing procedure for the involvement of all Group stakeholders in upholding high ethical standards and combating misconduct. - Outlines the procedure for sending reports via an online platform - Outlines ways to protect the reporter by ensuring anonymity and protection against any retaliation or discrimination - Establishes a training and information plan to ensure the dissemination and proper application of the procedure S1 own workforce, S2 Workers in the value chain, S3 Affected communities, S4 Consumers and end-users, G1 Business conduct. All Aquafil Group stakeholders. Aquafil's Board of Directors approved the Whistleblowing Procedure. The methods of periodic updating and reporting are managed by the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee and the Supervisory Board. Legislative Decree No. 24 of March 10, 2023 implementing European Directive No. 1937/2019. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 116]
Whistleblowing system [Source: Policy in materia di Diversity, Equality & Inclusion, Page 5]

All Aquafil employees have access to a whistleblowing system to report any suspected wrongdoing with guaranteed anonymity and protection against any form of retaliation or discrimination, as described in section 4.4. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 82]

With regard to the Whistleblowing Policy, the procedure has been adapted to the new regulations set forth in Legislative Decree No. 24/2023 implementing EU Directive 2019/1937. The reporting platform also now has the features required by the current new regulations. [Source: Corporate Governance and Ownership Structure Report, Page 40]

No statements or matters reported were received from shareholders during the year 2024. No petitions were submitted to the Board of Statutory Auditors during the year 2024. In this regard, we highlight that the company has adopted a 'whistleblowing' procedure, providing for the setting up of appropriate disclosure channels to ensure the receipt, analysis and handling of reports, regarding internal control, corporate disclosure, administrative responsibility of the company, fraud or other matters, sent by employees, members of the corporate boards or third parties and also confidentially or anonymously. With regard to the Whistleblowing Policy, the procedure was adapted to the regulations set forth in Legislative Decree No. 24/2023 implementing EU Directive 2019/1937. The reporting platform also has the features required by the current regulations. [Source: Annual Report, Page 253]

In 2024, no Group company incurred fines or other penalties for violations related to the Code of Conduct or related regulations, evidence of the effectiveness of the procedures and actions put in place as part of the corporate culture that the company monitors on a daily basis. [Source: Annual Report, Page 203]
no Group company incurred fines, penalties or legal action for irregularities or non-compliance with the Anti-Corruption Policy. [Source: Annual Report, Page 207]

Aquafil Group companies that hold SA 8000 Social Accountability certification have an additional tool at their disposal to report suspected human rights violations. These reports are collected through an online platform and then reviewed by the Comitato SA 8000, a technical body that also includes employee representatives. In 2024, no reports were received under SA 8000. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 115]
score_explanation_french: Aquafil a mis en place une procédure de dénonciation formelle et entièrement divulguée, accessible à toutes les parties prenantes du Groupe, y compris les employés, les fournisseurs, les entrepreneurs externes et les clients. Cette procédure autorise explicitement les signalements anonymes via une plateforme informatique, gérée par une entité indépendante (Organe de gestion). L'entreprise garantit l'anonymat, la confidentialité et la protection contre les représailles. Les signalements sont traités rapidement (dans les 7 jours) et examinés par un comité interne. Les résultats sont communiqués au dénonciateur dans les trois mois et régulièrement rapportés trimestriellement au Comité de Contrôle, des Risques et de la Durabilité et au Conseil de Surveillance. L'entreprise fournit également des indicateurs de transparence, y compris un résumé des signalements reçus en 2024, détaillant la nature, le statut de l'enquête et les actions de résolution (par exemple, 6 signalements reçus, certains infondés, un en cours d'enquête). Elle confirme également l'absence d'amendes ou de sanctions liées aux violations du Code de Conduite ou de la Politique Anticorruption en 2024, et l'absence de signalements SA 8000 en 2024. De plus, une formation sur le système de dénonciation est dispensée lors de l'intégration et par le biais de cours sur la conduite des affaires, et la plateforme est disponible dans toutes les principales langues du Groupe, garantissant un accès à 100 % des travailleurs et une utilisation à 98 % dans leur langue maternelle.
score_explanation_english: Aquafil has established a formal, fully disclosed Whistleblowing Procedure accessible to all Group stakeholders, including employees, suppliers, external contractors, and customers. This procedure explicitly allows for anonymous reporting through an IT platform, which is managed by an independent entity (Management Body). The company guarantees anonymity, confidentiality, and protection against retaliation. Reports are processed promptly (within 7 days) and reviewed by an internal committee. Outcomes are communicated to the reporter within three months and regularly reported quarterly to the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee and the Supervisory Board. The company also provides transparency metrics, including a summary of reports received in 2024 detailing the nature, investigation status, and resolution actions (e.g., 6 reports received, some unfounded, one under investigation). It also confirms no fines or penalties related to Code of Conduct or Anti-Corruption Policy violations in 2024, and no SA 8000 reports in 2024. Furthermore, training on the whistleblowing system is provided during onboarding and through business conduct courses, and the platform is available in all major Group languages, ensuring 100% worker access and 98% native language usability.
score_explanation_italian: Aquafil ha istituito una Procedura di Whistleblowing formale e pienamente divulgata, accessibile a tutti gli stakeholder del Gruppo, inclusi dipendenti, fornitori, appaltatori esterni e clienti. Questa procedura consente esplicitamente segnalazioni anonime tramite una piattaforma IT, gestita da un'entità indipendente (Organismo di Gestione). L'azienda garantisce anonimato, riservatezza e protezione contro le ritorsioni. Le segnalazioni vengono elaborate tempestivamente (entro 7 giorni) e riesaminate da un comitato interno. Gli esiti vengono comunicati al segnalante entro tre mesi e regolarmente riportati trimestralmente al Comitato Controllo, Rischi e Sostenibilità e al Consiglio di Sorveglianza. L'azienda fornisce anche metriche di trasparenza, inclusa una sintesi delle segnalazioni ricevute nel 2024 che dettaglia la natura, lo stato dell'indagine e le azioni risolutive (es. 6 segnalazioni ricevute, alcune infondate, una sotto indagine). Conferma inoltre l'assenza di multe o sanzioni relative a violazioni del Codice di Condotta o della Politica Anti-Corruzione nel 2024, e l'assenza di segnalazioni SA 8000 nel 2024. Inoltre, la formazione sul sistema di whistleblowing è fornita durante l'onboarding e tramite corsi di condotta aziendale, e la piattaforma è disponibile in tutte le principali lingue del Gruppo, garantendo il 100% di accesso ai lavoratori e il 98% di usabilità nella lingua madre.

user_friendly_explanation_italian: Aquafil ha solide fondamenta per la gestione dei dati, comprese chiare politiche e procedure per la cibersicurezza e la privacy, controlli regolari sulle misure di sicurezza e piani specifici per la gestione degli incidenti relativi ai dati. L'azienda afferma inoltre di non aver subito multe significative o azioni legali relative alla sua condotta nel 2024, il che suggerisce buone pratiche generali di gestione dei dati. user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil has a solid foundation for managing your data, including clear policies and procedures for cybersecurity and privacy, regular checks on security measures, and specific plans for handling data incidents. The company also states it had no major fines or legal actions related to its conduct in 2024, suggesting good overall data management practices. However, while they discuss their approach to preventing issues, specific details or numbers about past data breaches for Aquafil itself aren't publicly provided, which makes it harder to fully assess their transparency on past incidents.
information: Aquafil protects the confidentiality of your personal data and provides it with the necessary protection from any event that may put it at risk of violation.
The Data Controller implements policies and practices regarding the collection and use of personal data and the exercise of your rights under applicable law.

The Data Controller is responsible for updating the policies and practices adopted for the protection of personal data whenever necessary and in any case in the event of regulatory and organisational changes that may affect the processing of your personal data.
Aquafil has a 'Cyber Security procedure' in place.

The company's 'Integrated Management System' is aligned with international standards, including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, and ISO 30415, indicating a structured approach to management systems.
Aquafil has a 'Policy Privacy SOD (Segregation of Duties) 'Incident Response Plan' procedure' specifically for 'Loss of data'.
Privacy Policy documents for various stakeholders consistently mention data protection, confidentiality, data breach procedures, and the exercise of data subject rights.
The Data Controller envisages procedures for the management of personal data breach in compliance with the legal obligations to which it is subject.

The Data Controller periodically checks the tools by means of which data is processed and its security measures, which it constantly updates; it makes sure, also through the subjects authorised to process the data, that personal data for which processing is not necessary is not collected, processed, stored or retained; it makes sure that the data is retained with the guarantee of integrity and authenticity of its use for the purposes of the processing actually carried out.
Periodic cybersecurity training is an action for 'Loss of data'.

In 2024, no Group company incurred fines or other penalties for violations related to the Code of Conduct or related regulations, nor for irregularities or non-compliance in areas regulated by the Organisational Model or Anti-Corruption Policy.

The company appointed a 'Consolidation & ESG Director' as the Executive Officer for Financial Reporting and a 'President BCF' as the Executive Officer for Sustainability Reporting, effective March 1, 2025. A 'Data Protection Officer' has also been designated for Aquafil.

user_friendly_explanation_italian:
Aquafil dimostra una fortissima dedizione alla sicurezza e al corretto utilizzo delle tue informazioni personali. Dispongono di molteplici informative sulla privacy, ciascuna specificamente redatta per diversi gruppi come candidati, clienti e fornitori, e queste informative sono facili da trovare. Spiegano chiaramente quali informazioni raccolgono da te, perché le raccolgono, per quanto tempo le conservano e con chi potrebbero condividerle. Hai diritti chiari per visualizzare i tuoi dati, correggerli o chiederne la cancellazione, e ti dicono esattamente come fare, inclusi chi contattare e quanto rapidamente risponderanno. Spiegano anche come gestiscono la pubblicità e ti permettono di controllare le tue preferenze, e hanno un'informativa separata sui cookie. Seguono rigorose leggi europee sulla privacy e dispongono di un sistema per segnalare qualsiasi preoccupazione in modo confidenziale. Inoltre, ti informano dove sono archiviati i tuoi dati (in Europa) e come li proteggono se devono essere trasferiti altrove. Si concentrano sulla raccolta dei soli dati necessari e promettono di informarti su eventuali modifiche alle loro pratiche sulla privacy.

*   Forniscono molteplici informative sulla privacy specifiche e personalizzate per diversi soggetti (ad es. candidati, clienti, fornitori).
*   Spiegano chiaramente quali dati vengono raccolti, perché, per quanto tempo e con chi sono condivisi.
*   Hai il pieno controllo sui tuoi diritti relativi ai dati, con istruzioni chiare e informazioni di contatto.
*   Hanno processi per la gestione delle preferenze di marketing e una Politica sui Cookie dedicata.
*   Dispongono di un sistema di whistleblowing confidenziale per la segnalazione di preoccupazioni.
*   Rivelano le località di archiviazione dei dati e come gestiscono i trasferimenti internazionali di dati.
*   Hanno procedure pubbliche per la notifica delle violazioni dei dati e si impegnano a comunicare gli aggiornamenti sulla privacy.
user_friendly_explanation:
Aquafil shows a very strong dedication to keeping your personal information safe and used properly. They have many different privacy policies, each specially written for different groups like job applicants, customers, and suppliers, and these policies are easy to find. They explain clearly what information they collect from you, why they collect it, how long they keep it, and who they might share it with. You have clear rights to see your data, correct it, or ask for it to be deleted, and they tell you exactly how to do that, including who to contact and how quickly they will respond. They also explain how they handle advertising and let you control your preferences, and they have a separate policy about cookies. They follow strict European privacy laws and have a system for you to report any concerns confidentially. Plus, they tell you where your data is stored (in Europe) and how they protect it if it needs to go elsewhere. They focus on only collecting necessary data and promise to tell you about any changes to their privacy practices.

*   They provide many specific privacy policies tailored to different individuals (e.g., job applicants, customers, suppliers).
*   They clearly explain what data is collected, why, for how long, and with whom it's shared.
*   You have full control over your data rights with clear instructions and contact information.
*   They have processes for managing marketing preferences and a dedicated Cookie Policy.
*   They have a confidential whistleblowing system for reporting concerns.
*   They disclose their data storage locations and how they handle international data transfers.
*   They have public procedures for notifying data breaches and commit to communicating privacy updates.
information: Aquafil S.p.A. protects the confidentiality of personal data and provides it with the necessary protection from any event that may put it at risk of violation. The Data Controller is responsible for updating the policies and practices adopted for the protection of personal data whenever necessary and in any case in the event of regulatory and organisational changes that may affect the processing of personal data. [Source: Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 1]

Aquafil has a 'Privacy Governance and Management Model' as an internal regulatory reference. [Source: Policy in materia di Diversity, Equality & Inclusion, Page 5; Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy, Page 4]

The company has developed integrated system measures related to Data Protection and Cybersecurity to ensure maximum protection for employees and customers. [Source: Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 29]

Aquafil adopts and implements increasingly advanced processes and technologies to prevent and respond promptly to potential threats, ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information. It promotes an internal culture of responsibility and attention to data protection and Cybersecurity among employees. [Source: Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 45]
Aquafil has monitored data breach cases in its systems during fiscal years 2023 and 2024 and reports no incidents. [Source: Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 45, 69]

The Code of Conduct explicitly lists 'Data protection' and 'Protezione delle informazioni' (Information Protection) as key principles. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 112; Report di Sostenibilità, Page 112]

The Organisation, Management and Control Model (Model 231) aims to prevent offences such as unlawful processing of personal data. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 113; Annual Report, Page 27, 116; Report di Sostenibilità, Page 113]

Aquafil has a whistleblowing system accessible 24/7 to employees, suppliers, external contractors, and customers for reporting wrongdoing, irregularities, and non-compliance. This system guarantees anonymity, confidentiality, and protection against retaliation. It is managed by an independent entity ensuring confidentiality through security protocols and encryption. Reports are processed promptly (within 7 days), and a response is provided within 3 months. The platform is available in all major Group languages. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 115; Annual Report, Page 117, 118, 246; Report di Sostenibilità, Page 104, 115, 116; Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 7]

Data processing for job applicants is carried out on paper or through IT procedures by authorized and trained internal subjects. Special categories of data are processed separately using pseudonymisation or aggregation methods. The Data Controller periodically checks tools and security measures, ensuring data integrity and authenticity. [Source: Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 2]

Personal data for job applicants is retained for the time necessary for selection activities, or longer if rights are asserted in court. [Source: Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 3]

Job applicants have rights to obtain confirmation of processing, access data (origin, purposes, recipients, retention criteria), update/rectify, erase (under legal conditions), restrict processing, and obtain data in electronic format (portability). Requests are responded to within one month, extendable by two months with notification of reasons. Contact for requests is privacy@aquafil.com. [Source: Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 3]

Job applicants can submit complaints to the competent supervisory authority and will be informed of any updates to policies or processing for different purposes. [Source: Information Job applicants (Personal Data Processing), Page 4]

For B2B customers, personal data processing is based on contractual and legal obligations. Data is not disclosed to third parties for their own purposes without authorization, except when necessary for contract/legal obligations (e.g., Accountant, Banking institutions, Law firms, IT consultants, Public Bodies, Legal auditor, Supervisory Board, Insurance company). [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2B, Page 2]

The B2B policy states that failure to provide data may prevent contract management. It also notes legitimate interests for processing, such as preventing IT accidents and notifying data breaches to authorities/users. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2B, Page 2]
B2B customer data is processed with security measures and data minimization, similar to job applicants. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2B, Page 3]

B2B customers have data rights (confirmation, access, withdrawal consent, update, rectify, erase, restrict, portability), with clear instructions, response timeframes, and contact information (privacy@aquafil.com). Complaints can be lodged with the supervisory authority. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2B, Page 3, 4]

For B2C customers, data is processed for contractual management (invoicing, complaints, guarantees) and for legal obligations (e.g., keeping accounts). Communications can be by paper, phone, or email. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2C Who are we and what do we do with your personal data?, Page 1]
B2C customer data sharing is with similar categories of third parties as B2B. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2C Who are we and what do we do with your personal data?, Page 2]

For marketing activities (products/services, advertising, market research), B2C customer consent is required, and they have opt-out options. This processing will not occur if consent is not given or is revoked. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2C Who are we and what do we do with your personal data?, Page 2, 3]

B2C customer data retention for contractual purposes is ten years after contract conclusion or enforcement of rights; for tax/accounting obligations, it aligns with legal requirements. Marketing data is retained for two years from consent, unless revoked or objected to. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2C Who are we and what do we do with your personal data?, Page 3]

B2C customers have data rights (confirmation, access, withdrawal consent, update, rectify, erase, restrict, portability), with clear instructions, response timeframes, and contact information (privacy@aquafil.com). Complaints can be lodged with the supervisory authority. [Source: INFORMATION TO CUSTOMERS B2C Who are we and what do we do with your personal data?, Page 4, 5]

For Director Board members, data is processed for information security, ensuring network/server security against malicious acts. Procedures for personal data breach management are in place. [Source: Information – Director Board, Page 1]

Director Board data is retained within the European Economic Area. For transfers outside the EEA to Group Companies, standard contractual clauses are applied. For transfers to customers and suppliers outside the EEA, exemptions under GDPR Article 49(1)(b) are used. [Source: Information – Director Board, Page 2]

Director Board data retention is ten years after contract conclusion or enforcement of rights; for tax/accounting obligations. Retention of data from work tools is specified in the 'Work tool Privacy Policy'. [Source: Information – Director Board, Page 3]

Director Board members have data rights (confirmation, access, withdrawal consent, update, rectify, erase, restrict, portability), with clear instructions, response timeframes, and contact information (privacy@aquafil.com). Complaints can be lodged with the supervisory authority. [Source: Information – Director Board, Page 3, 4]

The Contacts Privacy Policy details data collected (IP, name, surname, email, company) for website management and information requests. Data is communicated to third parties necessary for these purposes or legal obligations, with prior consent for non-related communications. Data is not disseminated. [Source: Contacts Privacy Policy, Page 1]
Contacts data is stored for the time necessary to fulfill information requests and for system security checks, with effective security measures. [Source: Contacts Privacy Policy, Page 1]

Contacts have data rights (access, rectification, erasure, restriction, opposition, portability), with clear instructions, response timeframes, and contact information (privacy@aquafil.com). They can obtain copies of data. [Source: Contacts Privacy Policy, Page 2]
For suppliers, Aquafil S.p.A. and other entities act as Joint Controllers, protecting data confidentiality. [Source: Information - Suppliers, Page 1]

Supplier data collected includes name, surname, VAT, tax code, address, phone, and bank account. Processing is for supply contract management and obligations, based on contract, legal/regulatory obligations, Code of Ethics, or legitimate interest. [Source: Information - Suppliers, Page 1]
Supplier data processing involves authorized internal staff, security measures, and data minimization. [Source: Information - Suppliers, Page 2]
Supplier data retention is ten years after contract conclusion or enforcement of rights; for tax/accounting obligations. [Source: Information - Suppliers, Page 3]

Suppliers have data rights (confirmation, access, update, rectify, erase, restrict, portability, opposition), with clear instructions, response timeframes, and contact information (privacy@aquafil.com). Complaints can be lodged with the supervisory authority. [Source: Information - Suppliers, Page 3, 4]
For webinar participants, data is shared with Group companies, IT assistance services, and third-party IT/data processing companies. [Source: Privacy Policy - Webinar, Page 1]

The Webinar Privacy Policy explicitly states 'implementation of procedures for detecting and notifying personal data breaches (data breach)' as a purpose for compliance with legal obligations. [Source: Privacy Policy - Webinar, Page 2]
For Company Events, marketing activities (products/services, info/advertising) require consent and allow revocation. [Source: Privacy Policy - Company Events, Page 1]

The Information and Newsletter Privacy Policy details types of data collected (IP, name, surname, email, company, profession, area of interest) and purposes for information requests and marketing. [Source: Information and newsletter Privacy Policy, Page 1]

The Information and Newsletter Privacy Policy also explicitly states 'implementation of procedures for detecting and notifying personal data breaches (data breach)' as a purpose for compliance with legal obligations. [Source: Information and newsletter Privacy Policy, Page 2]
For Partners’ Events, marketing activities (products/services, info/advertising) require consent and allow revocation/objection. [Source: Privacy Policy - Partners’ Events, Page 1, 2]

The main Privacy Policy on the website lists various specific privacy policies (Job Applicants, B2B Customers, B2C Customers, Director Board, Contacts, Suppliers, Webinar, Company Events, Contact Forms and Newsletter, Partners’ Events, Newsletter, ECONYL® Club). [Source: https://aquafil.com/privacy-policy]
A dedicated Cookie Policy exists on the company's website. [Source: https://aquafil.com/cookie-policy]
score_explanation_french: Aquafil démontre un engagement de premier plan en matière de confidentialité des données, obtenant 100 points. L'entreprise propose un cadre robuste grâce à de multiples politiques de confidentialité détaillées et accessibles au public, adaptées à diverses catégories de personnes concernées (candidats à l'emploi, clients B2B/B2C, fournisseurs, etc.). Ces politiques couvrent de manière exhaustive les pratiques de collecte de données, les finalités du traitement, les périodes de rétention et le partage de données (y compris les catégories de tiers). Les droits des utilisateurs (accès, rectification, effacement, limitation, opposition, portabilité) sont clairement définis, avec des instructions détaillées pour leur exercice, des canaux de contact désignés (privacy@aquafil.com) et des délais de réponse spécifiés. L'entreprise aborde explicitement la publicité ciblée et offre des contrôles aux utilisateurs, et une politique de cookies dédiée est disponible. Aquafil confirme sa conformité au Règlement (UE) 2016/679 (RGPD) et à la législation italienne pertinente. Le système d'alerte sert de canal transparent et confidentiel pour signaler les violations, accessible à toutes les parties prenantes, avec des procédures de traitement et de réponse définies. En outre, Aquafil divulgue ses politiques de localisation des données au sein de l'EEE et les mécanismes de transfert transfrontalier de données (clauses contractuelles types, exceptions du RGPD). Les principes de minimisation des données et de limitation des finalités sont clairement énoncés. L'entreprise offre des contrôles granulaires aux utilisateurs sur leurs préférences en matière de données et divulgue publiquement ses procédures de notification des violations de données, ainsi qu'un engagement à communiquer les mises à jour de ses pratiques de confidentialité. Bien que la catégorie 'Leading' de la métrique mentionne la publication d'informations sommaires sur les demandes de données des autorités répressives comme une option, son absence ne diminue en rien la nature complète et proactive de l'engagement global d'Aquafil en matière de confidentialité des données, qui satisfait de manière extensive à presque tous les autres aspects des critères de leadership.
score_explanation_english: Aquafil demonstrates a leading commitment to data privacy, scoring 100 points. The company provides a robust framework through multiple publicly available and detailed privacy policies tailored for various data subjects (job applicants, B2B/B2C customers, suppliers, etc.). These policies comprehensively address data collection practices, processing purposes, retention periods, and data sharing (including categories of third parties). User rights (access, rectification, erasure, restriction, opposition, portability) are clearly outlined, with detailed instructions for exercise and designated contact channels (privacy@aquafil.com) and specified response timeframes. The company explicitly addresses targeted advertising and provides user controls, and a dedicated Cookie Policy is available. Aquafil confirms compliance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and relevant Italian legislation. The whistleblowing system serves as a transparent and confidential channel for reporting violations, accessible to all stakeholders, with defined processing and response procedures. Furthermore, Aquafil discloses data localization within the EEA and mechanisms for cross-border data transfers (standard contractual clauses, GDPR exemptions). Principles of data minimization and purpose limitation are clearly articulated. The company offers granular user controls over data preferences and publicly discloses its data breach notification procedures, along with a commitment to communicate updates to its privacy practices. While the metric's 'Leading' category mentions publishing summary information about law enforcement data requests as an option, its absence does not detract from the comprehensive and proactive nature of Aquafil's overall data privacy commitment, which fulfills almost all other aspects of the leading criteria extensively.

L'azienda fornisce un quadro solido attraverso molteplici informative sulla privacy pubbliche e dettagliate, personalizzate per varie categorie di interessati (candidati, clienti B2B/B2C, fornitori, ecc.).
