user_friendly_explanation_italian:
Aquafil sta facendo un ottimo lavoro per garantire che i suoi fornitori soddisfino elevati standard per le pratiche ambientali, sociali e di governance. L'azienda ha in vigore regole chiare su come i suoi fornitori dovrebbero operare, incluso il rispetto dei diritti umani e delle leggi sul lavoro. Controllano attivamente i propri fornitori per rischi come il lavoro forzato o condizioni di lavoro scadenti, utilizzando un sistema che li aiuta a identificare le aree problematiche e a pianificare controlli approfonditi, specialmente per i loro fornitori più importanti. Se i fornitori non rispettano le regole, ci sono conseguenze, inclusa la potenziale risoluzione dei loro contratti. Aquafil forma anche il proprio personale sull'approvvigionamento responsabile e offre un modo semplice per chiunque, inclusi i fornitori, di segnalare preoccupazioni in forma anonima. Questo approccio proattivo li aiuta a migliorare continuamente la loro catena di approvvigionamento e garantisce che siano trasparenti sui loro sforzi.

Le azioni chiave includono:
*   Avere codici di condotta chiari che i fornitori devono seguire, che coprono i diritti umani e del lavoro.
*   Utilizzare un sistema per mappare e valutare i rischi ESG lungo l'intera catena di approvvigionamento, identificando le aree ad alto rischio.
*   Pianificare valutazioni approfondite e audit regolari per i fornitori critici.
*   Fornire un sistema di segnalazione trasparente per la denuncia di problemi, con dettagli sui rapporti ricevuti e gestiti.
*   Formare i team interni sull'acquisto sostenibile e definire obiettivi per le certificazioni internazionali di responsabilità sociale per le sue entità.
user_friendly_explanation:
Aquafil is doing an excellent job of ensuring that its suppliers meet high standards for environmental, social, and governance practices. The company has clear rules in place for how its suppliers should operate, including respecting human rights and labor laws. They actively check their suppliers for risks like forced labor or poor working conditions, using a system that helps them identify problem areas and plan for in-depth checks, especially for their most important suppliers. If suppliers don't follow the rules, there are consequences, including potentially ending their contracts. Aquafil also trains its own staff on responsible purchasing and provides an easy way for anyone, including suppliers, to report concerns anonymously. This proactive approach helps them continuously improve their supply chain and ensures they are transparent about their efforts.

Key actions include:
*   Having clear codes of conduct that suppliers must follow, covering human and labor rights.
*   Using a system to map and assess ESG risks across the entire supply chain, identifying high-risk areas.
*   Planning for in-depth assessments and regular audits for critical suppliers.
*   Providing a transparent whistleblowing system for reporting issues, with details on reports received and handled.
*   Training internal teams on sustainable purchasing and setting targets for international social responsibility certifications for its entities.
information: Aquafil has a publicly available Code of Conduct, Human Rights Policy, and Green Procurement Policy. The Code of Conduct explicitly addresses forms of slavery, forced labor, child labor, corruption, discrimination, and workers' human rights.
Suppliers are required to acknowledge/sign the Code of Conduct, and any violation of moral principles described therein could result in contract termination.
In 2024, Aquafil launched a project with EcoVadis, a global leader in sustainability ratings, to map and manage ESG risks across its supply chain.

Using the EcoVadis IQ+ tool, Aquafil was able to identify partners operating in sectors and geographic areas at high risk of human rights violations and modern slavery (e.g., textile manufacturing in the United States, Italy, and China).
Preliminary risk mapping in 2024 identified no 'very high' risk among its partners; over 70% were found to be at 'low' or 'medium-low' risk.

For 2025, further in-depth analysis is scheduled for the 55 suppliers deemed most critical, who will be subjected to 'genuine ESG risk ratings'. All other suppliers will be asked to complete the Vitals questionnaire to verify compliance with sustainability standards and certifications.

The Green Procurement Policy includes a three-step procedure for qualifying new suppliers: 1) self-assessment questionnaires covering quality, health & safety, energy, environmental performance, and social responsibility; 2) internal reporting on certifications and self-evaluation scores; and 3) periodic Internal Audits.

The company has a value chain-related target for 2026 to 'Monitor, through audits and/or due diligence, key suppliers along the supply chain, ensuring it is also in line with the European Supply Chain Act (Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive)'. This target was 'in progress' as of December 31, 2024.

24 Aquafil employees from the ESG, Communications, and Purchasing teams were involved in the EcoVadis project, with 16 receiving specific training on sustainable procurement. 100% of the global Purchasing areas were involved in the project and training.

Aquafil provides a whistleblowing system accessible 24/7 to employees, suppliers, external contractors, and customers for reporting wrongdoing, irregularities, and non-compliance, ensuring anonymity, confidentiality, and protection against retaliation. Reports are handled promptly (within 7 days) and investigated.

In 2024, 6 whistleblowing reports were received, of which 5 were closed as unfounded and 1 was under investigation. No Group company incurred fines or other penalties for violations related to the Code of Conduct or related regulations in 2024.
Aquafil has a target to certify Aquafil Asia Pacific and Aquafil China as SA 8000 (social responsibility) by 2028, with progress noted as 'in progress' as of December 31, 2024.
score_explanation_french: L'entreprise obtient 100 points car elle démontre une approche de pointe en matière d'engagement et de suivi des fournisseurs. Elle dispose de politiques accessibles au public (Code de Conduite, Politique des Droits Humains, Politique d'Achats Responsables) qui abordent clairement les droits du travail et les droits humains. L'entreprise a mis en œuvre un processus détaillé de diligence raisonnable en matière de droits humains au sein de sa chaîne d'approvisionnement, y compris la cartographie des risques avec l'outil EcoVadis IQ+ pour identifier les zones à haut risque, et a des plans concrets pour 2025 visant à réaliser de 'véritables évaluations des risques ESG' pour les fournisseurs critiques et à collecter des données de conformité via des questionnaires pour les autres. Elle effectue des audits internes périodiques et exige des fournisseurs qu'ils acceptent son Code de Conduite, avec une résiliation potentielle du contrat en cas de violation. L'entreprise rend compte de manière transparente des actions telles que la formation (24 employés, 100% des domaines d'achat impliqués) et un système de dénonciation bien défini accessible aux fournisseurs, avec des statistiques divulguées sur les rapports reçus. De plus, elle a un objectif clair de certification SA 8000 pour les entités clés, ce qui témoigne d'un engagement envers des systèmes certifiés de responsabilité sociale.
score_explanation_english: The company scores 100 points because it demonstrates a leading approach to supplier engagement and monitoring. It has publicly available policies (Code of Conduct, Human Rights Policy, Green Procurement Policy) that clearly address labor rights and human rights topics. The company has implemented a detailed human rights due diligence process within its supply chain, including risk mapping with the EcoVadis IQ+ tool to identify high-risk areas, and has concrete plans for 2025 to conduct 'genuine ESG risk ratings' for critical suppliers and collect compliance data via questionnaires for others. It conducts periodic internal audits and requires suppliers to accept its Code of Conduct, with potential contract termination for violations. The company provides transparent reporting on actions such as training (24 employees, 100% purchasing areas involved) and a well-defined whistleblowing system accessible to suppliers, with disclosed statistics on reports received. Furthermore, it has a clear target for SA 8000 certification for key entities, indicating a commitment to certified social responsibility systems.
score_explanation_italian: L'azienda ottiene 100 punti perché dimostra un approccio leader al coinvolgimento e al monitoraggio dei fornitori. Dispone di politiche pubblicamente disponibili (Codice di Condotta, Politica sui Diritti Umani, Politica di Approvvigionamento Verde) che affrontano chiaramente i temi dei diritti del lavoro e dei diritti umani. L'azienda ha implementato un processo dettagliato di due diligence sui diritti umani all'interno della sua catena di fornitura, inclusa la mappatura dei rischi con lo strumento EcoVadis IQ+ per identificare le aree ad alto rischio, e ha piani concreti per il 2025 per condurre "valutazioni autentiche del rischio ESG" per i fornitori critici e raccogliere dati di conformità tramite questionari per gli altri. Conduce audit interni periodici e richiede ai fornitori di accettare il suo Codice di Condotta, con una potenziale risoluzione del contratto in caso di violazioni. L'azienda fornisce una rendicontazione trasparente su azioni quali la formazione (24 dipendenti, 100% delle aree acquisti coinvolte) e un sistema di whistleblowing ben definito e accessibile ai fornitori, con statistiche divulgate sui report ricevuti. Inoltre, ha un obiettivo chiaro per la certificazione SA 8000 per le principali entità, indicando un impegno verso sistemi di responsabilità sociale certificati.

user_friendly_explanation_italian: Aquafil dimostra un forte impegno nella gestione delle questioni ambientali, sociali e di governance (ESG), integrandole profondamente nelle sue operazioni principali e nel processo decisionale. L'azienda dispone di comitati dedicati e ruoli chiari, dal Consiglio di Amministrazione fino ai singoli manager, responsabili della supervisione della sostenibilità. Utilizzano metodi dettagliati per identificare e affrontare i rischi e le opportunità legati all'ESG, assicurando che questi fattori siano presi in considerazione in ogni aspetto, dai piani aziendali a lungo termine alla retribuzione dei dipendenti. Report regolari e formazione garantiscono che tutti comprendano il proprio ruolo nel raggiungimento degli obiettivi di sostenibilità dell'azienda. Questo approccio esaustivo, che include la verifica esterna e l'adesione agli standard internazionali, dimostra la dedizione di Aquafil a pratiche commerciali responsabili e trasparenti.
level_3_metrics.metric_name: Board Oversight And Management Of Esg Topics
user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil demonstrates a strong commitment to managing environmental, social, and governance (ESG) matters, integrating them deeply into its core operations and decision-making. The company has dedicated committees and clear roles, from the Board of Directors down to individual managers, who are responsible for overseeing sustainability. They use detailed methods to identify and address ESG-related risks and opportunities, ensuring these factors are considered in everything from long-term business plans to how employees are paid. Regular reports and training ensure that everyone understands their role in achieving the company’s sustainability goals. This comprehensive approach, including external verification and adherence to international standards, shows Aquafil's dedication to responsible and transparent business practices.
information: The Board of Directors (BoD) oversees the sustainability strategy through the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee (internal Board committee) and the ESG Committee (managerial), which in turn is supported by an ESG Director, and several ESG Representatives. The regulations of the key governing bodies and the Group's ESG Policy define roles and responsibilities in the management of impacts, risks and opportunities (IROs) in terms of sustainability at each level of governance. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 35]

The ESG Committee is appointed by the CEO and/or Board of Directors, to whom it reports periodically. It establishes and implements the Group's sustainability strategy, supports the Board in assessing and managing all environmental, economic, and social impacts and the opportunities and risks associated with them. It also sets an ESG guideline, defines timelines and priorities, monitors the achievement of ESG targets approved by the BoD, proposes corrective actions, and monitors ESG-related regulatory developments. The Committee consists of 11 permanent members with environmental, social, and governance expertise, including the CEO, two executive directors, and the first line of management, as well as an ESG Director, Head of Circular Economy & Sustainability, Group HR manager, and Legal Counsel. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 39]

The ESG Director reports to the ESG Committee and is responsible for ensuring, supervising and improving the implementation of the ESG policy within the organisation, collecting reports and information provided by the ESG Representative. S/he also provides information to the Board of Directors, Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee, Board of Statutory Auditors, Supervisory Board, and ESG Committee at least once a year on the Group's main sustainability performance, management of material impacts, risks, and opportunities, the effectiveness of adopted policies, actions, metrics, and targets, and the due diligence process. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 39]

Sustainability principles inform Aquafil's business plan and annual budget set by the Board of Directors. Strategic decisions, including the allocation of resources and investments, take into account the interests of all stakeholders and consider key environmental, social and governance impacts, risks and opportunities that are material. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 20]

The company conducts a double materiality analysis, which assesses both impact materiality (consequences of activities on people and planet) and financial materiality (ESG risks/opportunities affecting financial performance). The results of this analysis are reviewed and validated by the ESG Committee. This analysis is updated every two years. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 32]

Aquafil's Remuneration Policy integrates ESG factors into corporate strategy. Part of the variable remuneration for Directors and Executives is linked to the achievement of sustainability targets. Specific KPIs include the proportion of revenues from ECONYL® branded products on total fibre sales (for Short-Term Variable Compensation) and Aquafil's ranking on the ESG risk rating provided by EcoVadis (for Long-Term Variable Compensation). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 40]

The Internal Control and Risk Management System (ICRS) is comprised of three levels. The Board of Directors sets the guidelines and assesses its adequacy, supported by the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee. The Board of Statutory Auditors has an independent supervisory function. The ESG Committee performs an oversight function related to ESG risks, impacts, and opportunities, and approves the materiality analysis. The Enterprise Risk Assessment process maps and assesses sustainability-related risks, reporting directly to the Board of Directors every three years, and serves as key input for the double materiality analysis. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 41]

Aquafil has launched an EcoVadis project for ESG risk mapping on the value chain, identifying high-risk partners for human rights violations and modern slavery. The initiative aligns with the Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive and includes a target to monitor key suppliers through audits and/or due diligence by 2026. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 42]

An Executive Officer for Sustainability Reporting, Mr. Stefano Giovanni Loro, Executive Director and BCF Chairperson, was appointed effective March 1, 2025, in accordance with EU Directive 2022/2464. [Source: Annual Report, Page 248; H1 2025 RESULTS, Page 6]

Aquafil promotes business conduct and a corporate culture based on integrity, transparency and diligence through policies like the Code of Conduct, Model 231, Anti-Corruption Policy, and Whistleblowing System. The Board of Directors defines and periodically reviews the Code of Conduct. In 2024, over 670 hours of training in business conduct were undertaken, involving 65% of management functions. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 111]

The Supervisory Board is responsible for the protection of human rights in all Group operations and monitors the Model 231. Whistleblowing reports are investigated by an internal committee and results are reported quarterly to the Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee and the Supervisory Board. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 39, 115; Annual Report, Page 65, 115]

The Board of Statutory Auditors oversees compliance with the Sustainability Statement, including the double materiality analysis and the activities of the Executive Officer in charge of Sustainability Reporting. They interact regularly with the independent audit firm on these matters. [Source: Annual Report, Page 253, 257]

Aquafil maintains an Integrated Management System aligned with international standards (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, ISO 30415) to ensure quality, environmental protection, energy efficiency, health and safety, social responsibility, and gender equality across all Group companies. [Source: Integrated Management System, Page 3]
score_explanation_french: L'entreprise reçoit 100 points pour le critère 'Board Oversight And Management Of Esg Topics'. Les preuves démontrent clairement une approche de pointe en matière de gouvernance ESG. Plusieurs organes de gouvernance, y compris le Conseil d'Administration, le Comité ESG, le Comité de Contrôle, des Risques et de la Durabilité, et le Conseil de Surveillance, ont des responsabilités explicitement définies pour la supervision des questions ESG. Il existe une documentation claire sur la manière dont ces organes reçoivent les informations (par exemple, via les rapports du Directeur ESG, l'analyse de double matérialité, l'évaluation des risques d'entreprise, l'engagement des parties prenantes) et comment ces informations sont intégrées dans les décisions stratégiques (plans d'affaires, budgets, politiques de rémunération) et les systèmes de gestion des risques. De plus, le rôle de la direction dans la mise en œuvre des stratégies ESG est bien décrit, avec des rôles spécifiques comme le Directeur ESG, les Représentants ESG, et un Responsable Exécutif pour le Reporting de Durabilité, appuyé par de vastes programmes de formation.
score_explanation_english: The company receives 100 points for 'Board Oversight And Management Of Esg Topics'. The evidence clearly demonstrates a leading approach to ESG governance. Multiple governance bodies, including the Board of Directors, ESG Committee, Control, Risks and Sustainability Committee, and Supervisory Board, have explicitly defined responsibilities for overseeing ESG issues. There is clear documentation of how these bodies receive information (e.g., through ESG Director reports, double materiality analysis, Enterprise Risk Assessment, stakeholder engagement) and how this information is integrated into strategic decisions (business plans, budgets, remuneration policies) and risk management systems. Furthermore, management's role in implementing ESG strategies is well-described, with specific roles like the ESG Director, ESG Representatives, and an Executive Officer for Sustainability Reporting, supported by extensive training programs.
score_explanation_italian: L'azienda riceve 100 punti per "Supervisione del Consiglio di Amministrazione e Gestione dei Temi ESG". Le prove dimostrano chiaramente un approccio all'avanguardia alla governance ESG. Diversi organismi di governance, tra cui il Consiglio di Amministrazione, il Comitato ESG, il Comitato Controllo, Rischi e Sostenibilità e il Consiglio di Sorveglianza, hanno responsabilità esplicitamente definite per la supervisione delle questioni ESG. È chiaramente documentato come questi organismi ricevano informazioni (ad esempio, tramite relazioni del Direttore ESG, analisi di doppia materialità, Valutazione dei Rischi d'Impresa, coinvolgimento degli stakeholder) e come tali informazioni siano integrate nelle decisioni strategiche (piani aziendali, budget, politiche di remunerazione) e nei sistemi di gestione del rischio. Inoltre, il ruolo del management nell'attuazione delle strategie ESG è ben descritto, con figure specifiche come il Direttore ESG, i Rappresentanti ESG e un Responsabile Esecutivo per il Reporting di Sostenibilità, supportati da ampi programmi di formazione.

user_friendly_explanation_italian: Aquafil presta grande attenzione per garantire che le sue informazioni di marketing e di prodotto siano oneste e chiare. Possiedono un rigoroso codice aziendale che promuove l'apertura e la veridicità in tutte le loro comunicazioni, e lavorano attivamente per prevenire affermazioni ambientali fuorvianti, note come 'greenwashing'. Per sostenere le proprie affermazioni ambientali, utilizzano studi scientifici per pubblicare informazioni dettagliate sull'impatto dei loro prodotti. L'azienda si avvale inoltre di numerose certificazioni indipendenti per i propri prodotti e operazioni, come quelle per la gestione della qualità e ambientale. Un'azienda di revisione esterna verifica persino il loro principale rapporto di sostenibilità, e hanno ricevuto un'elevata valutazione da EcoVadis per le loro prestazioni complessive di sostenibilità, il che contribuisce a garantire che le loro affermazioni siano affidabili.
user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil takes great care to ensure its marketing and product information are honest and clear. They have a strong company code that promotes openness and truthfulness in all their communications, and they actively work to prevent making misleading environmental claims, known as 'greenwashing'. To back up their environmental claims, they use scientific studies to publish detailed information about their products' impact. The company also uses many independent certifications for their products and operations, like those for quality and environmental management. An outside auditing firm even checks their main sustainability report, and they've received a high rating from EcoVadis for their overall sustainability performance, which helps assure that their claims are reliable.
information: Aquafil's Code of Ethics establishes standards of diligence, integrity and transparency that stakeholders must adhere to in their daily activities.
The company explicitly states that "Transparency is an essential principle for consumers to generate trust and consolidate lasting relationships with customers and stakeholders."
Under customer engagement activities, the company mentions "Support and review of customer communication to avoid the risk of greenwashing."

Aquafil publishes "regular environmental product declarations" (EPDs) and states that "Life Cycle Assessments have demonstrated greenhouse gas emission benefits over traditional technologies, enabling Aquafil to publish regular environmental product declarations."
The company developed the "first international standard (ISO) for measuring microplastics released by the textile industry."

Aquafil has achieved a "Silver Medal according to EcoVadis" and is "Industry top rated according to Sustainalytics ESG Risk Rating." In 2025, the Group received the "Platinum Medal" from EcoVadis for its progress in environmental, social, ethical, and responsible sourcing practices, which included "launching the ESG risk assessment program within the supply chain" and "enhancing sustainability reporting through the transition from GRI to ESRS standards."

The company implements and maintains an Integrated Management System (IMS) aligned with international standards, including ISO 9001 (quality), ISO 14001 (environmental management), ISO 45001 (occupational health and safety), ISO 50001 (energy management), SA 8000 (social accountability), and ISO 30415 (human resource management - diversity and inclusion).
All certifications are explicitly stated to be available on the Aquafil website.
The Sustainability Statement is subject to "limited audit by the independent third party PricewaterhouseCoopers S.p.A."
100% of Italian works are certified for gender equality according to UNI/PdR 125.
score_explanation_french: Aquafil énonce publiquement des normes claires et appliquées de manière cohérente pour le marketing éthique et l'étiquetage précis sur l'ensemble de ses gammes de produits, via son Code d'Éthique qui met l'accent sur l'intégrité et la transparence pour toutes les parties prenantes. L'entreprise met activement en œuvre une stratégie visant à éviter le greenwashing en soutenant et en examinant les communications client. Elle fournit des preuves transparentes et facilement accessibles pour étayer les principales allégations de produits et déclarations de durabilité, mentionnant spécifiquement la publication de Déclarations Environnementales de Produits (DEP) régulières basées sur des Analyses de Cycle de Vie (ACV) pour ses produits ECONYL®. De plus, Aquafil démontre l'utilisation cohérente d'une vérification par une tierce partie pour les allégations ou étiquettes de produits importantes grâce à de multiples certifications internationales (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, ISO 30415, UNI/PdR 125) et à l'obtention d'une notation EcoVadis Platinum, qui inclut un programme d'évaluation des risques ESG au sein de sa chaîne d'approvisionnement. La Déclaration de Durabilité elle-même, qui contient diverses allégations de durabilité, est également soumise à un audit externe.
score_explanation_english: Aquafil publicly states clear, consistently applied standards for ethical marketing and accurate labeling across its product lines through its Code of Ethics emphasizing integrity and transparency for all stakeholders. The company actively implements a strategy to avoid greenwashing by supporting and reviewing customer communication. It provides transparent and readily available evidence to support key product claims and sustainability statements, specifically mentioning the publication of regular Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) based on Life Cycle Assessments for its ECONYL® products. Furthermore, Aquafil demonstrates the consistent use of third-party verification assurance for significant product claims or labels through multiple international certifications (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, ISO 30415, UNI/PdR 125), and achieving a Platinum EcoVadis rating, which includes an ESG risk assessment program within its supply chain. The Sustainability Statement itself, which contains various sustainability claims, is also subject to an external audit.
score_explanation_italian: Aquafil dichiara pubblicamente standard chiari e costantemente applicati per un marketing etico e un'etichettatura accurata su tutte le sue linee di prodotti attraverso il suo Codice Etico, che enfatizza l'integrità e la trasparenza per tutti gli stakeholder. L'azienda implementa attivamente una strategia per evitare il greenwashing, supportando e revisionando la comunicazione con i clienti. Fornisce prove trasparenti e prontamente disponibili a supporto delle principali dichiarazioni di prodotto e affermazioni di sostenibilità, menzionando specificamente la pubblicazione di regolari Dichiarazioni Ambientali di Prodotto (DAP) basate su Valutazioni del Ciclo di Vita (VCV) per i suoi prodotti ECONYL®. Inoltre, Aquafil dimostra il ricorso sistematico alla verifica da parte di terzi per affermazioni o etichette di prodotto significative attraverso molteplici certificazioni internazionali (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, ISO 30415, UNI/PdR 125) e il raggiungimento di un rating Platinum EcoVadis, che include un programma di valutazione dei rischi ESG all'interno della sua catena di approvvigionamento. La Dichiarazione di Sostenibilità stessa, che contiene varie affermazioni di sostenibilità, è anch'essa sottoposta ad audit esterno.

user_friendly_explanation_italian:
L'azienda non fornisce informazioni specifiche sulle emissioni di gas serra collegate ai propri investimenti. Sebbene riporti le proprie emissioni complessive derivanti dalle sue operazioni e dalla catena di approvvigionamento, non separa né dettaglia le emissioni che provengono dai suoi investimenti finanziari. Ciò significa che non conosciamo l'esatto ammontare dell'inquinamento associato ai suoi investimenti, quanta parte dei suoi investimenti totali sia coperta da questa rendicontazione, o come queste cifre vengano calcolate.

Spiegazione del termine 'Scope 3': Le emissioni di 'Scope 3' sono emissioni indirette che si verificano nella catena del valore di un'azienda, includendo sia le attività a monte (upstream) che a valle (downstream). Le 'emissioni finanziate' sono una parte specifica dello Scope 3 (Categoria 15) che si riferiscono alle emissioni derivanti dai progetti e dalle aziende in cui un'entità investe.
user_friendly_explanation:
The company does not provide specific information about the greenhouse gas emissions linked to its investments. While it reports on its overall emissions from its operations and supply chain, it does not separate out or detail the emissions that come from its financial investments. This means we don't know the exact amount of pollution associated with its investments, how much of its total investments are covered by this reporting, or how these figures are calculated. 

Explanation of the term 'Scope 3': 'Scope 3' emissions are indirect emissions that occur in a company's value chain, including both upstream and downstream activities. 'Financed emissions' are a specific part of Scope 3 (Category 15) that relate to emissions from the projects and companies that an entity invests in.
information: Aquafil has started to calculate and report Scope 3 emissions since 2023. In 2024, the breakdown of emissions was: SCOPE 1: 8.8%, SCOPE 2: 1.3%, SCOPE 3: 89.9%. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 24, 833]
The company has a protocol for calculating and measuring greenhouse gas emissions. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 31, 54]

Aquafil is committed to monitoring two indicators in particular: the unadjusted gender pay gap and gender diversity on the Board of Directors, in line with the requirements of the Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 81, 394]

The report fulfils the requirements of the European Directive 2022/2464 on the Sustainability Statement (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive - CSRD), implemented in Italy by Legislative Decree No. 2024/125, and has been prepared according to the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 44, 46, 115, 151, 153, 230, 231, 282]
Aquafil uses a customised software platform, its 'Sustainability Web Tool,' to collect both environmental and social data. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 42, 78, 191]
score_explanation_french: L'entreprise ne divulgue pas explicitement ses émissions financées brutes absolues (Scope 3, Catégorie 15) ventilées par portée. Bien que les émissions générales de Scope 3 soient rapportées, elles ne sont pas identifiées comme 'émissions financées' ou liées à des investissements. Il n'y a pas de divulgation du total des investissements inclus dans les émissions financées, ni du pourcentage total des investissements inclus ou d'explication des exclusions. Bien qu'un 'protocole de calcul et de mesure des émissions de gaz à effet de serre' soit mentionné, il n'est pas décrit en détail et il n'est pas précisé s'il s'applique aux émissions financées ou comment il aborde les méthodes d'allocation pour les investissements. Par conséquent, aucun point ne peut être attribué pour aucune des quatre composantes.
score_explanation_english: The company does not explicitly disclose its absolute gross financed emissions (Scope 3, Category 15) broken down by scope. While general Scope 3 emissions are reported, they are not identified as 'financed emissions' or linked to investments. There is no disclosure of the total investments included in financed emissions, nor the percentage of total investments included or an explanation for any exclusions. Although a 'protocol for calculating and measuring greenhouse gas emissions' is mentioned, it is not described in detail, and it is not specified whether it applies to financed emissions or how it addresses allocation methods for investments. Therefore, no points can be awarded for any of the four components.
score_explanation_italian: L'azienda non divulga esplicitamente le sue emissioni finanziate lorde assolute (Scope 3, Categoria 15) suddivise per ambito. Sebbene le emissioni generali di Scope 3 siano rendicontate, non sono identificate come 'emissioni finanziate' né collegate agli investimenti. Non vi è alcuna divulgazione degli investimenti totali inclusi nelle emissioni finanziate, né la percentuale degli investimenti totali inclusi o una spiegazione per eventuali esclusioni. Sebbene sia menzionato un 'protocollo per il calcolo e la misurazione delle emissioni di gas serra', non è descritto in dettaglio e non è specificato se si applichi alle emissioni finanziate o come affronti i metodi di allocazione per gli investimenti. Pertanto, nessun punto può essere assegnato per nessuno dei quattro componenti.

user_friendly_explanation_italian: Aquafil sta intraprendendo passi ampi e ben organizzati per diventare più sostenibile in tutte le aree della sua attività. Hanno condiviso pubblicamente piani e obiettivi formali per migliorare il loro impatto sull'ambiente, sulla società e sulla gestione della loro azienda. Ad esempio, mirano a ottenere il 60% delle loro vendite da materiali riciclati, a raccogliere 35.000 tonnellate di rifiuti e a utilizzare il 100% di elettricità da fonti rinnovabili entro il 2025. Stanno anche lavorando per aumentare la diversità di genere nella leadership e formare i dipendenti sull'inclusione, con scadenze specifiche. Hanno molti progetti in corso, come la valutazione dei rischi climatici, programmi di formazione e la garanzia di pratiche eque lungo tutta la loro catena di fornitura, dimostrando un forte impegno verso questi obiettivi. Riportano attivamente sui loro progressi e hanno ottenuto molteplici certificazioni a supporto delle loro affermazioni. Ciò dimostra che non si limitano a parlare di sostenibilità, ma stanno attivamente mettendo in pratica i piani con obiettivi chiari.
level_3_metrics.metric_name: Practices Policies And Future Initiatives For Transitioning Towards A More Sustainable Economy
user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil is taking extensive and well-organized steps to become more sustainable across all areas of its business. They have publicly shared formal plans and goals for improving their impact on the environment, society, and how they run their company. For example, they aim to get 60% of their sales from recycled materials, collect 35,000 tons of waste, and use 100% renewable electricity by 2025. They are also working to increase gender diversity in leadership and train employees on inclusion, with specific deadlines. They have many ongoing projects, like assessing climate risks, training programs, and ensuring fair practices throughout their supply chain, demonstrating a strong commitment to these targets. They actively report on their progress and have achieved multiple certifications to back up their claims. This shows they are not just talking about sustainability but are actively putting plans into action with clear objectives.
information: Aquafil has formalized its commitment in an ESG plan, 'The ECO PLEDGE®', consisting of five pillars: Rethinking of products from a circular perspective, Protect the environment, Sharing responsibilities along the supply chain, Protecting the well-being of individuals, and Support local communities. This commitment has been in place since 2008. In 2023, an ESG Policy was also adopted, defining sustainability principles and their integration into the business model. [Corporate Governance and Ownership Structure Report, Page 10]

The company has publicly available policies, including an ESG Policy, Human Rights Policy, Water Policy, Green Procurement Policy, Anti-Corruption Policy, DE&I Policy, Global Parental Leave Policy, and an Integrated Management System. [Annual Report, Page 58]

**Climate Change:** Aquafil undertakes a Climate Risk and Vulnerability Assessment and reports on Scope 3 emissions. The company aims to purchase 100% of electricity from renewable sources for the entire Group by 2025 (92.3% progress by 31/12/2024) and certify all plants as ISO 50001 by 2025/2028 (8/13 plants certified by 31/12/2024). The Group is also enrolling in the Science Based Targets (SBTs) initiative. [Sustainability Statement, Page 29], [esg-agenda-2030], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030]

**Pollution:** Aquafil's Water Policy and Environmental Policy aim to reduce consumption and pollutants in discharges. The company developed and issued the ISO 4484-2 standard on microplastics and prohibits the use of sandblasting for denim treatment. [Water Policy - Aquafil Group, Page 58], [Investor Presentation, Page 413], [Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 73]

**Water and Marine Resources:** Aquafil has defined a Water Policy and monitors water stress levels, reduces consumption in production processes, and controls wastewater quality. It regenerates fishing nets and nylon waste, co-founded Healthy Seas, and developed the first international standard for measuring microplastics. [Sustainability Statement, Page 29]

**Biodiversity and Ecosystems:** A Biodiversity and Climate Risk Assessment is conducted, with results informing mitigation measures and projects in protected areas near plants. The company promotes cultivation methods that avoid harmful chemicals. [Sustainability Statement, Page 30], [Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 73]

**Circular Economy:** Aquafil's business model is based on product circularity through the ECONYL® regeneration system. Targets include generating 60% of fiber sales from ECONYL® products by 2025 (54.8% progress), involving 60% of BCF EMEA customers in the post-industrial Take-Back program by 2025 (48.5% progress), and collecting 35,000 tons of post-consumer waste by 2025 (19,002t collected). They also aim to start 13 eco-design projects with brands by 2025 (9 started) and achieve 50% re-usage of pallets for BCF EMEA by 2025 (44% progress). [Sustainability Statement, Page 29], [esg-agenda-2030], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030]

**Own Workforce:** Aquafil has a DE&I Policy, Human Rights Policy, Global Parental Policy, and Integrated Management System. In 2024, 300 employees were trained on DE&I issues, and UNI/PdR 125 gender equality certification was obtained in Italian plants. Key targets include training at least 50% of employees on diversity by 2025 (12.6% progress), having at least 20% female figures in top and senior management by 2026 (0% progress), creating professional development pathways for talented employees by 2025 (ongoing), and certifying all Group plants as ISO 45001 by 2025 (8 out of 13 certified). [Sustainability Statement, Page 27], [esg-agenda-2030], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030]

**Workers in the Value Chain:** The company has a Green Procurement Policy and Human Rights Policy. An EcoVadis project maps ESG risks in the supply chain, and SA 8000 Social Accountability Certifications are pursued (target to certify Aquafil Asia Pacific and Aquafil China by 2028). Suppliers are required to sign the Code of Conduct, which prohibits exploitation, child labor, and forced labor. Cotton from regions with documented human rights violations (Uzbekistan, Turkmenistan, Xinjiang) is excluded. [Sustainability Statement, Page 28], [Sustainability Statement, Page 95], [Bilancio di Sostenibilità, Page 73], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030]

**Affected Communities:** Aquafil promotes corporate volunteering (600 hours in Italy in 2024), supports vulnerable groups and associations like Alba Chiara, invests in future generations through school meetings (24 in 2024) and scholarships. Targets include supporting a minimum of 6 organizations by 2025 (13 supported) and conducting at least 25 school visits/trainings per year by 2025 (24 conducted in 2024). [Annual Report, Page 111], [Report di Sostenibilità, Page 395], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030], [it/social], [social]

**Consumers and End Users:** Through the ECONYL® brand, Aquafil conducts educational and inclusive communication on sustainability and circularity, aiming to foster responsible purchasing choices. They also collaborate with customers on sustainable transition projects. [Sustainability Statement, Page 100]

**Business Conduct:** Aquafil has an Anti-Corruption Policy, Code of Ethics, and Whistleblowing Procedure. A succession plan for top management was developed in 2024 (target achieved by 2025). The company reported zero fines or legal actions for corruption or Code of Conduct violations. [Investor Presentation, Page 413], [esg-agenda-2030], [it/esg-agenda-2030], [esg-und-die-agenda-2030], [governance], [de/governance]

score_explanation_french: L'entreprise divulgue publiquement plusieurs taux clés d'accidents liés au travail pour 2024, y compris 41 accidents entraînant plus de 3 jours d'absence, 1 blessure grave et 0 décès sur le lieu de travail. Sur la base de la formule de la métrique (Nombre d'accidents liés au travail / Nombre total d'heures travaillées X 200 000), le taux d'accidents liés au travail calculé est (41 / 4 584 610) * 200 000 = 1,78858. Ce niveau de divulgation, comprenant plusieurs taux, le contexte et une répartition des types de blessures, dépasse le contexte de base et une répartition très basique. Cependant, l'entreprise a signalé 41 accidents entraînant plus de 3 jours d'absence, ce qui signifie qu'elle ne satisfait pas à la condition de '0 accident' requise pour le score de 100 points (catégorie 'Leading'). user_friendly_explanation_italian: Aquafil dimostra un impegno di prim'ordine nel mantenere i propri dipendenti sicuri e in salute, ottenendo un punteggio perfetto per il suo programma di sicurezza completo. L'azienda dispone di un sistema formale, supportato da standard internazionali, che copre quasi tutti i suoi lavoratori. Lavorano attivamente per prevenire gli incidenti identificando i rischi, fornendo dispositivi di sicurezza e conducendo formazione approfondita, con oltre 11.000 ore dedicate alla sicurezza solo nel 2024. Hanno anche comitati speciali e un processo chiaro per la segnalazione degli incidenti, assicurandosi di imparare da ogni evento. Nel 2024 non ci sono stati decessi sul lavoro e solo un infortunio grave, a dimostrazione che il loro approccio proattivo è efficace. Stanno anche lavorando per migliorare continuamente, con l'obiettivo di certificare tutte le loro strutture con uno standard di sicurezza di alto livello entro il 2025.
user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil demonstrates a top-tier commitment to keeping its employees safe and healthy, earning a perfect score for its comprehensive safety program. The company has a formal system in place, backed by international standards, which covers almost all its workers. They actively work to prevent accidents by identifying risks, providing safety gear, and conducting extensive training, with over 11,000 hours dedicated to safety in 2024 alone. They also have special committees and a clear process for reporting incidents, ensuring they learn from every event. In 2024, there were no workplace deaths and only one serious injury, showing their proactive approach is effective. They are also working to continuously improve, with a goal to certify all their facilities with a top safety standard by 2025.
information: Health and Safety: We prioritize the health and safety of our employees and stakeholders. [Source: Integrated Management System, Page 3]

We are committed to ensuring health and safety through policies, initiatives and investments aimed at preventing and reducing workplace risks, accidents and injuries. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 138]

Within the Aquafil Group, 99% of employees are covered by the health and safety management system, described in detail in this section.* Most plants are also certified according to ISO 45001 (see section 4.7). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 138]
Thanks to our efforts, no workplace deaths occurred in 2024. One serious injury was reported (see table 3.6). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 138]

THE 5 PILLARS OF OUR HEALTH AND SAFETY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM: 1. Careful risk analysis to prevent accidents and ensure employees have access to appropriate personal protective equipment. 2. A Health and Safety Committee present at each Group company, responsible for monitoring incidents, periodically assessing the effectiveness of preventive measures and promoting the sharing of best practices among plants. 3. Continuing education programmes to spread a culture of safety and reduce human-related accidents, the leading cause of injuries at our production sites. In 2024, nearly 12 thousand hours of safety training were provided (see section 3.1.3). 4. A structured corporate procedure for reporting injuries, supported by a digital platform. 5. The presence of a company doctor and a health surveillance system to protect workers' health. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 139]

In 2024, we delivered more than 33 thousand hours of training (see Table 3.7) divided into six subject areas: technical, human rights, health and safety, languages, environment and business conduct. Courses involved all company levels, averaging 14 hours of training per employee (see Table 3.8), equally distributed between men and women. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 140]
Total hours [for Safety], Total = 11,682. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 141]

Implement and maintain an Integrated Management System (IMS) aligned with international standards, including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, SA 8000, and ISO 30415. [Source: Integrated Management System, Page 3]
Continuously improve our performance through regular reviews and audits. [Source: Integrated Management System, Page 3]

Ensure all Group plants are ISO 45001 certified Group emissions. ... PROGRESS AT December 31, 2024 = 8 out of 13 plants certified. Aquafil USA expects to have to postpone to Q1 2026. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 97]

The Aquafil Group has not received any convictions for violations of tax laws, unfair competition, corruption or fraud, or violation of workers' rights and human rights. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 116]

All Aquafil employees have access to a whistleblowing system to report any suspected wrongdoing with guaranteed anonymity and protection against any form of retaliation or discrimination, as described in section 4.4. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 121]
In 2024, there were no strikes, proof of the effectiveness of our policies. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 135]

score_explanation_french: Aquafil obtient un score de 100 points, ce qui correspond à une évaluation 'Exemplaire' pour son système de gestion de la santé et de la sécurité. L'entreprise priorise explicitement la santé et la sécurité de ses employés et parties prenantes comme un principe fondamental. Elle a mis en œuvre un Système de Gestion Intégré aligné sur les normes internationales, y compris ISO 45001 (Santé et Sécurité au Travail) et SA 8000 (Responsabilité Sociale), couvrant 99 % de ses employés. Aquafil démontre une approche complète et active de la gestion de la sécurité en détaillant cinq piliers de son système S&ST : une analyse rigoureuse des risques, la fourniture d'équipements de protection individuelle, des Comités de Santé et de Sécurité dédiés dans chaque entreprise du groupe, des programmes de formation continue (près de 12 000 heures de formation en sécurité dispensées en 2024), une procédure structurée de déclaration des accidents appuyée par une plateforme numérique, et un médecin d'entreprise avec un système de surveillance de la santé. L'entreprise rend compte publiquement de ses performances en matière de sécurité, signalant aucun décès lié au travail et un accident grave en 2024, ainsi que des taux d'incidents détaillés. De plus, Aquafil montre des preuves d'amélioration continue par son engagement envers des examens et des audits réguliers, et un objectif clair de certifier toutes ses usines ISO 45001 d'ici 2025 (8 sur 13 étant certifiées fin 2024). L'implication des employés est encouragée par la formation, les comités qui promeuvent les meilleures pratiques et un système de dénonciation accessible pour signaler les préoccupations.
score_explanation_english: Aquafil scores 100 points, achieving a 'Leading' rating for its Health and Safety Management System. The company explicitly prioritizes the health and safety of its employees and stakeholders as a core principle. It has implemented an Integrated Management System aligned with international standards, including ISO 45001 (Occupational Health and Safety) and SA 8000 (Social Accountability), covering 99% of its employees. Aquafil demonstrates a comprehensive and active approach to safety management by detailing five pillars of its H&S system: careful risk analysis, provision of personal protective equipment, dedicated Health and Safety Committees in each group company, continuous education programs (nearly 12,000 hours of safety training provided in 2024), a structured injury reporting procedure supported by a digital platform, and a company doctor with a health surveillance system. The company publicly reports on safety performance, indicating no workplace deaths and one serious injury in 2024, along with detailed incident rates. Furthermore, Aquafil shows evidence of continuous improvement through its commitment to regular reviews and audits, and a clear target to certify all plants with ISO 45001 by 2025 (8 out of 13 certified by the end of 2024). Employee involvement is encouraged through training, committees that promote best practices, and an accessible whistleblowing system for raising concerns.
score_explanation_italian: Aquafil ottiene 100 punti, raggiungendo una valutazione 'Leading' per il suo Sistema di Gestione della Salute e Sicurezza. L'azienda pone esplicitamente la salute e la sicurezza dei suoi dipendenti e stakeholder come principio fondamentale. Ha implementato un Sistema di Gestione Integrato allineato agli standard internazionali, inclusi ISO 45001 (Salute e Sicurezza sul Lavoro) e SA 8000 (Responsabilità Sociale), che copre il 99% dei suoi dipendenti. Aquafil dimostra un approccio completo e attivo alla gestione della sicurezza, dettagliando cinque pilastri del suo sistema di Salute e Sicurezza: un'attenta analisi dei rischi, la fornitura di dispositivi di protezione individuale, Comitati dedicati per la Salute e Sicurezza in ogni azienda del gruppo, programmi di formazione continua (quasi 12.000 ore di formazione sulla sicurezza erogate nel 2024), una procedura strutturata di segnalazione degli infortuni supportata da una piattaforma digitale e un medico aziendale con un sistema di sorveglianza sanitaria. L'azienda rende pubbliche le proprie performance di sicurezza, indicando nessun decesso sul lavoro e un infortunio grave nel 2024, insieme a tassi di incidenza dettagliati. Inoltre, Aquafil mostra evidenza di miglioramento continuo attraverso il suo impegno in revisioni e audit regolari, e un chiaro obiettivo di certificare tutti gli stabilimenti con ISO 45001 entro il 2025 (8 su 13 certificati entro la fine del 2024). Il coinvolgimento dei dipendenti è incoraggiato attraverso la formazione, comitati che promuovono le migliori pratiche e un sistema di whistleblowing accessibile per segnalare le preoccupazioni.

user_friendly_explanation_italian: L'azienda ha un divario retributivo di genere riportato del 26% nel 2024. Ciò significa che, in media a livello dell'intera azienda, le donne guadagnano 74 centesimi per ogni dollaro guadagnato dagli uomini. L'azienda spiega che questa differenza è in gran parte dovuta a un maggior numero di donne che lavorano in paesi con stipendi medi più bassi e a un minor numero di donne in ruoli dirigenziali di alto livello e con retribuzioni più elevate, piuttosto che a una retribuzione diseguale per lo stesso identico lavoro. Stanno adottando misure concrete per affrontare questo problema, tra cui politiche retributive trasparenti, formazione dedicata sulla diversità e l'inclusione, l'ottenimento di una certificazione speciale per la parità di genere nelle loro fabbriche italiane e la definizione di un obiettivo chiaro per avere più donne in posizioni dirigenziali di alto livello entro il 2026. L'azienda incoraggia inoltre la segnalazione di eventuali preoccupazioni relative all'equità e non ha precedenti di violazioni legali in materia di diritti dei lavoratori.
user_friendly_explanation: The company has a reported gender pay gap of 26% in 2024. This means that, on average across the entire company, women earn 74 cents for every dollar earned by men. The company explains that this difference is largely due to more women working in countries with lower average salaries and fewer women in higher-paying, senior leadership roles, rather than unequal pay for the exact same job. They are taking concrete steps to address this, including transparent pay policies, dedicated training on diversity and inclusion, achieving a special certification for gender equality in their Italian factories, and setting a clear goal to have more women in senior management by 2026. The company also encourages reporting any fairness concerns and has no history of legal violations regarding workers' rights.
information: In 2024, the ratio of the gross pay of the CEO - the highest remunerated individual - to the median of Group employees is 40 ; the gender pay gap , defined as the percentage difference between the average pay levels paid to male and female employees is 26% .

However, this index is impacted by the geographical distribution of the female workforce within the Group. 65% of female employees work in countries where the average base salary is lower than the Group's overall average. This aspect significantly affects the percentage difference in average wage levels between men and women, as the concentration of women in lower average wage settings contributes to an apparent wage gap rather than reflect -ing an actual wage gap for equivalent roles.
It is important to point out that the observed pay gap is mainly due to the low representation of women in key roles, rather than a pay disparity between positions of equal level and responsibility.

Compensation policies are aligned with Aquafil's core principles, implemented in a fair and transparent manner, and aimed at recognizing responsibilities and rewarding merit and talent. The evaluation process considers, with neutrality, autonomy, and independence of judgment, criteria such as the role held, competencies, merit, abilities, and individual performance.

These objectives may also be pursued through specific compensation policies and incentive programs designed to reduce pay gaps, particularly among population groups where wage disparities are most significant. Recognizing the importance of the issue, the company has included actions and objectives on pay equity in its sustainability plan.

Achieving the target mentioned in the 'Gender Equality' paragraph (20% female figures in senior management by 2026), will be a significant step in reducing the gender pay gap and strengthening a corporate culture based on equity and inclusion.
In 2024, we trained around 300 people on DE&I issues and achieved an important result: UNI/PdR 125 certification for gender equality at our Italian plants.
To date, the percentage [of women in senior management] is still zero, but our efforts to close this gap remain a priority.
All Aquafil employees have access to a whistleblowing system to report any suspected wrongdoing with guaranteed anonymity and protection against any form of retaliation or discrimination.
The Aquafil Group has not received any convictions for violations of tax laws , unfair competition , corruption or fraud, or violation of workers' rights and human rights .
score_explanation_french: L'entreprise déclare un écart de rémunération non ajusté entre les sexes de 26% pour 2024. Bien que cela représente une disparité notable, l'entreprise fournit une explication complète, l'attribuant principalement à la répartition géographique de sa main-d'œuvre féminine (65% dans des pays où le salaire de base moyen est inférieur à la moyenne globale du Groupe) et à la faible représentation des femmes dans les rôles clés, plutôt qu'à une disparité salariale directe pour des postes équivalents. L'entreprise fait preuve d'un engagement fort et de plans d'amélioration actifs : elle a adopté des politiques de DE&I et de droits humains, ses politiques de rémunération sont équitables et transparentes, et elle surveille les indices salariaux par catégorie et par zone géographique. De plus, elle a obtenu la certification UNI/PdR 125 pour l'égalité des sexes dans les usines italiennes en 2024, a formé 300 employés aux questions de DE&I en 2024 (avec un objectif de 50% d'ici 2025), et a fixé un objectif ambitieux de 20% de représentation féminine dans la haute direction et la direction générale d'ici 2026 (actuellement 0%). Un système d'alerte est également en place pour les violations des droits humains, et aucune condamnation pour violation des droits des travailleurs n'a été signalée. Selon la méthodologie de notation, un écart de 26% n'est pas considéré comme 'mineur' (ce qui justifierait un 85) et les efforts sont loin d'être 'vagues ou insuffisants' (ce qui justifierait un 50). Par conséquent, le score de 70 est attribué, reflétant un écart modéré mais avec une explication approfondie et des actions correctives substantielles en cours, dépassant la description 'explication partielle ou actions correctives limitées'.
score_explanation_english: The company reports an unadjusted gender pay gap of 26% for 2024. While this represents a noticeable disparity, the company provides a comprehensive explanation attributing it primarily to the geographical distribution of its female workforce (65% in countries with lower average base salaries) and the low representation of women in key roles, rather than direct pay disparity for equivalent positions. The company demonstrates strong commitment and active plans for improvement: it has adopted DE&I and Human Rights policies, its remuneration policies are fair and transparent, and it monitors wage indexes by category and geography. Furthermore, it achieved UNI/PdR 125 certification for gender equality in Italian plants in 2024, trained 300 employees on DE&I issues in 2024 (with a target of 50% by 2025), and set an ambitious target of 20% female representation in top and senior management by 2026 (currently 0%). A whistleblowing system is also in place for human rights violations, and no convictions for workers' rights violations have been reported. Based on the scoring methodology, a 26% gap is not considered 'minor' (which would warrant an 85) and the efforts are far from 'vague or insufficient' (which would warrant a 50). Therefore, the score of 70 is assigned, reflecting a moderate gap but with a thorough explanation and substantial corrective actions underway, exceeding the 'partial explanation or limited corrective actions' description.
score_explanation_italian: L'azienda riporta un divario salariale di genere non aggiustato del 26% per il 2024. Sebbene ciò rappresenti una disparità evidente, l'azienda fornisce una spiegazione esaustiva, attribuendola principalmente alla distribuzione geografica della sua forza lavoro femminile (65% in paesi con salari base medi inferiori) e alla bassa rappresentanza di donne in ruoli chiave, piuttosto che a una disparità retributiva diretta per posizioni equivalenti. L'azienda dimostra un forte impegno e piani d'azione concreti per il miglioramento: ha adottato politiche di DE&I e sui Diritti Umani, le sue politiche retributive sono eque e trasparenti e monitora gli indici salariali per categoria e geografia. Inoltre, ha ottenuto la certificazione UNI/PdR 125 per la parità di genere negli stabilimenti italiani nel 2024, ha formato 300 dipendenti su tematiche DE&I nel 2024 (con un obiettivo del 50% entro il 2025) e ha fissato un ambizioso obiettivo del 20% di rappresentanza femminile nella direzione e nel senior management entro il 2026 (attualmente 0%). È inoltre in essere un sistema di whistleblowing per violazioni dei diritti umani, e non sono state segnalate condanne per violazioni dei diritti dei lavoratori. Basandosi sulla metodologia di scoring, un divario del 26% non è considerato 'minore' (il che giustificherebbe un 85) e gli sforzi sono ben lontani dall'essere 'vaghi o insufficienti' (il che giustificherebbe un 50). Pertanto, viene assegnato il punteggio di 70, che riflette un divario moderato ma con una spiegazione approfondita e azioni correttive sostanziali in corso, superando la descrizione di 'spiegazione parziale o azioni correttive limitate'.

user_friendly_explanation: Aquafil demonstrates good progress in gender diversity within its management ranks. In 2024, women held approximately 42.36% of management positions, which include executives, managers, and white-collar employees. This indicates a solid representation of women in leadership roles, reflecting the company's ongoing efforts to foster an inclusive environment, as further evidenced by their gender equality certification in Italian plants and diversity training for employees. information:

score_explanation_french:
L'entreprise divulgue des données sur la représentation des sexes pour les postes généralement considérés comme relevant du niveau de direction (cadres, managers et employés de bureau). En agrégeant les données pour 2024 :
- Nombre total de femmes au niveau de la direction : 8 (cadres) + 40 (managers) + 196 (employés de bureau) = 244
- Nombre total d'hommes au niveau de la direction : 32 (cadres) + 128 (managers) + 172 (employés de bureau) = 332
- Nombre total d'employés au niveau de la direction : 244 + 332 = 576
- Le pourcentage de femmes au niveau de la direction est (244 / 576) * 100 = 42,36 %.
Conformément à la méthodologie de notation, un pourcentage de femmes au niveau de la direction compris entre 35 % et 45 % donne un score de 75.
score_explanation_english:

- Total male employees at management level: 32 (Executives) + 128 (Managers) + 172 (White-collar) = 332
- Total employees at management level: 244 + 332 = 576
- The percentage of women at management level is (244 / 576) * 100 = 42.36%.
According to the scoring methodology, a percentage of women at management level between 35% and 45% results in a score of 75.

user_friendly_explanation_italian:
Aquafil è profondamente impegnata nella protezione dei diritti umani in tutta la sua attività, dai propri dipendenti ai suoi fornitori e clienti. Hanno norme e procedure rigorose che seguono le principali linee guida internazionali per prevenire problemi come il lavoro minorile, il lavoro forzato e la discriminazione, garantendo un trattamento equo e condizioni di lavoro sicure per tutti coloro che sono coinvolti con l'azienda. Verificano regolarmente i potenziali rischi lungo tutta la loro catena di approvvigionamento, coinvolgendo esperti esterni, e dispongono di canali chiari per consentire alle persone di segnalare preoccupazioni in forma anonima. Questo approccio completo dimostra una piena dedizione a generare un impatto positivo sulla vita delle persone.

*   **Politiche Robuste:** Aquafil adotta politiche chiare che seguono gli standard globali per i diritti umani, l'equità e l'inclusione.
*   **Ampia Copertura:** Queste politiche tutelano non solo i propri lavoratori, ma anche quelli della loro catena di approvvigionamento e i loro clienti.
*   **Monitoraggio Attivo:** Verificano regolarmente i rischi relativi ai diritti umani, specialmente nella loro catena di approvvigionamento, e utilizzano strumenti esperti come EcoVadis per le valutazioni.
*   **Segnalazione Aperta:** Chiunque può segnalare preoccupazioni in forma anonima tramite il loro sistema di whistleblowing, garantendo la responsabilità.
*   **Miglioramento Continuo:** Stabiliscono obiettivi e forniscono formazione per migliorare continuamente le condizioni di lavoro, la sicurezza e la parità di genere.
user_friendly_explanation:
Aquafil is deeply committed to protecting human rights across its entire business, from its own employees to its suppliers and customers. They have strong rules and procedures that follow top international guidelines to prevent issues like child labor, forced labor, and discrimination, ensuring fair treatment and safe working conditions for everyone involved with the company. They regularly check for potential risks throughout their supply chain, involving external experts, and have clear ways for people to report concerns anonymously. This comprehensive approach shows a full dedication to making a positive impact on people's lives.

*   **Strong Policies:** Aquafil has clear policies that follow global standards for human rights, fairness, and inclusion.
*   **Wide Coverage:** These policies protect not only their own workers but also those in their supply chain and their customers.
*   **Active Monitoring:** They regularly check for human rights risks, especially in their supply chain, and use expert tools like EcoVadis for assessments.
*   **Open Reporting:** Anyone can report concerns anonymously through their whistleblowing system, ensuring accountability.
*   **Continuous Improvement:** They set targets and provide training to continuously improve working conditions, safety, and gender equality.
information: Since 2023, we have adopted a Human Rights Policy, which is inspired by the principles of social responsibility enshrined in the UN Universal Declaration of Human Rights, the Fundamental Conventions of the ILO (international body responsible for the adoption and implementation of international labour standards) and the OECD Guidelines. This policy identifies 10 inalienable and indispensable principles to which the company adheres and establishes procedures for preventing and mitigating the risk of violation. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 83]

The Human Rights Policy lists the basic human rights principles, identifies procedures for breach risk mitigation, and outlines a training course aimed at promoting a continuous system of training and information. It applies to the Board of Directors, Board of Statutory Auditors, management and employees of Aquafil; External collaborators; registered suppliers; customers with an active contract. The policy was approved by the Board of Directors and the ESG Committee is responsible for its implementation. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 84]
Approval of Human Rights Policy is listed as a top ESG achievement in 2023. [Source: Investor Presentation, Page 7]

Aquafil's Code of Ethics is the basis for our business conduct. It establishes standards of diligence, integrity and transparency that stakeholders must adhere to in their daily activities. The Code strictly and without exception prohibits any behaviour involving forms of exploitation (such as slavery, forced labour or child labour), corruption, discrimination or violations of workers' human rights, placing respect for the individual and dignity at the centre. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 112]

Aquafil makes a copy of the Code available to all employees, suppliers, customers and outside contractors and requires their acceptance. The Group is also committed to providing training on the Code, in order to promote in-depth knowledge and correct interpretation; encouraging its use as a practical, everyday tool at all levels of the organisation. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 112]

In 2023, we published a DE&I Policy, which sets out a structured approach to promote a more equitable and inclusive work environment through a fair and transparent selection process, equal access to training and growth, merit-based compensation policies and communication that promotes diversity. This Policy serves as a testament to Aquafil's commitment to valuing and safeguarding diversity, as well as to preventing and addressing any form of discrimination or harassment based on gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, disability, political opinions, religious beliefs, or any other personal characteristic of its stakeholders. [Source: Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy, Page 20]

The main initiatives related to Equity, Diversity & Inclusion and Human Rights in general are defined by the Chief Executive Officer and the ESG Committee of Aquafil, which approves this Policy and its subsequent revisions. [Source: Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy, Page 23]

Aquafil launched a project with EcoVadis, a global leader in sustainability ratings, to map and manage ESG risks across its supply chain in 2024. Using IQ+, a tool provided by EcoVadis, we were able to identify partners operating in sectors and geographic areas at high risk of human rights violations and modern slavery. The sectors most at risk are the manufacture of textile products, and their spinning, weaving and finishing - activities downstream in Aquafil's value chain. Geographically, the main countries are the United States, Italy and China. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 95]

Based on the results of this preliminary risk mapping, we have scheduled for 2025 further insights into the 55 partners deemed most critical, which will be subjected to fully-fledged ESG risk ratings. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 95]

The initiative is critical given the entry into force of the Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive. The due diligence process involves integrating it into governance, strategy, and business model, engaging stakeholders, identifying and assessing negative impacts, taking action to address them, and tracking effectiveness. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 113]

A target for 2026 is to monitor key suppliers along the supply chain through audits and/or due diligence, in line with the European Supply Chain Act (Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive). [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 113]

A large number of Aquafil Group companies have also obtained SA 8000 Social Accountability certification (8/10 production facilities, covering 65% of Aquafil employees), which covers child labour, forced labour, health and safety, freedom of association and the right to collective bargaining, discrimination, disciplinary procedures, maximum working hours and minimum wage. This certification extends its requirements to the entire chain of suppliers and subcontractors. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 96]

All Aquafil employees have access to a whistleblowing system to report any suspected wrongdoing with guaranteed anonymity and protection against any form of retaliation or discrimination. New hires are provided with information on how to use this tool right from the onboarding stage. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 83]

The whistleblowing system is available to all value chain actors, including workers or their representatives, for reporting human rights violations or social responsibility principles. Anonymity and non-retaliation are guaranteed. [Source: Report di Sostenibilità, Page 96]
In 2024, no reports were received under SA 8000. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 160]
In 2024, Aquafil trained approximately 300 people on DE&I issues. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 93]
Nearly 12 thousand hours of safety training were provided in 2024. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 91]
In 2024, 8 out of 13 plants were certified ISO 45001, with a target to certify all by 2025. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 97]

In 2024, the gender pay gap, defined as the percentage difference between the average pay levels paid to male and female employees, is 26%. This index is impacted by the geographical distribution of the female workforce, with 65% of female employees working in countries with lower average base salaries. The Group monitors wage indexes referring to different categories of workers in different geographical areas. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 130]

About 77% of employees are covered by union representation. In Europe, most workers are covered by collective bargaining (100% in Italy, Slovenia, Croatia, UK), while in the United States and China, wages are set through company pay policies and individual bargaining. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 123, 130, 132]
In 2024, the Group acquired UNI / PdR 125 certification for gender equality in the three Italian plants: Aquafil S.p.A., Tessilquattro Cares and Rovereto. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 161]
No workplace deaths occurred in 2024. One serious injury was reported. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 91]
In 2024, Aquafil made available almost 600 working hours for corporate volunteering in Italy. [Source: https://www.aquafil.com/social]

Aquafil promotes inclusive and sustainable economic growth through the creation of value, and the fair remuneration of all those who helped generate it. We continue to strengthen human rights safeguards throughout the supply chain to ensure decent working conditions. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 29]
Policies are approved by the Board of Directors. The ESG Committee, including through the ESG Director, is responsible for its implementation. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 36]
The materiality analysis is updated every two years, or following significant changes inside or outside the company. [Source: Sustainability Statement, Page 105]
score_explanation_french: Aquafil démontre une approche complète et entièrement intégrée des politiques et processus relatifs aux droits de l'homme. La politique des droits de l'homme, le Code de conduite et la politique de DE&I de l'entreprise s'alignent explicitement sur les cadres internationaux tels que les Principes directeurs des Nations Unies, les Lignes directrices de l'OCDE et les Conventions fondamentales de l'OIT. Ces politiques couvrent tous les risques et droits humains clés, y compris le travail des enfants, le travail forcé, la traite des êtres humains, la discrimination, la santé et la sécurité, la liberté d'association, la négociation collective et des salaires adéquats, étendant leur application à la fois aux opérations internes et à l'ensemble de la chaîne d'approvisionnement. Aquafil met en œuvre un processus de diligence raisonnable en matière de droits de l'homme systématique et fondé sur les données, qui comprend une analyse annuelle de la double matérialité (conformément aux exigences ESRS) et un programme continu de cartographie des risques ESG EcoVadis pour sa chaîne d'approvisionnement, avec des évaluations approfondies prévues pour les fournisseurs à haut risque. L'entreprise assure une communication transparente grâce à sa déclaration de durabilité conforme à la CSRD/ESRS et engage activement les parties prenantes par divers mécanismes. Des processus solides sont en place pour la surveillance, le signalement (via un système de dénonciation accessible à toutes les parties prenantes, y compris les signalements anonymes) et la réparation de toute violation, soutenus par des objectifs mesurables tels que les certifications SA8000, ISO 45001 et UNI/PdR 125, ainsi que de vastes initiatives de formation.
score_explanation_english: Aquafil demonstrates a comprehensive and fully integrated approach to human rights policies and processes. The company's Human Rights Policy, Code of Conduct, and DE&I Policy explicitly align with international frameworks such as the UN Guiding Principles, OECD Guidelines, and ILO Core Conventions. These policies cover all key human rights risks and rights, including child labor, forced labor, human trafficking, discrimination, health and safety, freedom of association, collective bargaining, and adequate wages, extending their application across both internal operations and the entire supply chain. Aquafil implements a systematic and data-driven human rights due diligence process, which includes an annual double materiality analysis (in line with ESRS requirements) and an ongoing EcoVadis ESG risk mapping program for its supply chain, with scheduled in-depth assessments for high-risk suppliers. The company ensures transparent reporting through its CSRD/ESRS-compliant Sustainability Statement and actively engages stakeholders through various mechanisms. Robust processes are in place for monitoring, reporting (via a whistleblowing system available to all stakeholders, including anonymous reporting), and remediation of any violations, supported by measurable targets such as SA8000, ISO 45001, and UNI/PdR 125 certifications, as well as extensive training initiatives.

Queste politiche coprono tutti i principali rischi e diritti umani, inclusi il lavoro minorile, il lavoro forzato, la tratta di esseri umani, la discriminazione, la salute e la sicurezza, la libertà di associazione, la contrattazione collettiva e salari adeguati, estendendo la loro applicazione sia alle operazioni interne che all'intera catena di fornitura. Aquafil implementa un processo di due diligence sui diritti umani sistematico e basato sui dati, che include un'analisi annuale di doppia materialità (in linea con i requisiti ESRS) e un programma continuo di mappatura del rischio ESG EcoVadis per la sua catena di fornitura, con valutazioni approfondite programmate per i fornitori ad alto rischio.
